name: Impasto
description: Thick dabs of oil paint left where the knife dropped them — each stroke casts a little ridge of shadow, re-daubed per redraw.

code.style: --paint1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color5)); --paint2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(8%, 26%); top: @rand(22%, 48%); width: @rand(44%, 70%); height: @rand(16%, 26%); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--paint1); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); box-shadow: calc(8px / @Y) calc(10px / @Y) 0 rgba(60, 50, 30, 0.25); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.4) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(40%, 60%); top: @rand(56%, 70%); width: @rand(24%, 40%); height: @rand(10%, 16%); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--paint2); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); box-shadow: calc(6px / @Y) calc(8px / @Y) 0 rgba(60, 50, 30, 0.22); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
